data.settleTest: Only observing how large operators actually onboard an uncertified pre-launch entrant over Year 1 settles this — whether they enforce ISO 27001/IEC 62443 as a hard gate or admit on self-declaration/conditional waivers. NIS2 being in force today does not settle vendor onboarding behavior, which unfolds through each operator's procurement response over the coming 12-24 months.

researchQueries.query: STACK Infrastructure, NTT, or Equinix Germany approved-vendor onboarding requirements 2026: do rack-power/PDU suppliers need ISO 27001 or IEC 62443 certification at contract signing versus remediation timeline?
Examples of uncertified or pre-launch power-equipment vendors admitted to EU hyperscale/colo procurement in 2025-2026 via self-declaration, conditional approval, or integrator pass-through under NIS2
